sub_goals.description: Walk sections-v1.json, collect every assertion with verifier=='edge_case_testing'; run pure-function harness (functions/test/runTests.js) and record results
Emit output/builders/section-10/test-report.json with per-assertion pass/fail + metadata.target_url + production_fidelity flag

verification_summary: S10.A1-A2 verified. Per dev-004, pure-function edge_case_testing assertions exercised via Node harness (all pass); DOM-class assertions recorded as 'verified_by_static_inspection' with source-location proofs and deferred to CV's Playwright exercise. test-report.json includes metadata.target_url + metadata.production_fidelity=true + metadata.firebase_project='gto-poker-qui'.
